title: E2B Python Sandbox SDK
relevance: Documents E2B Sandbox creation, filesystem, command, PTY, git, internet, lifecycle, and network options used for API comparison.

title: Daytona Python Sandbox SDK
relevance: Documents Daytona sandbox attributes and operations including filesystem, process, computer-use, code interpreter, start, stop, delete, resize, and lifecycle timers.

title: Modal Sandbox Reference
relevance: Documents Modal Sandbox process-like API, exec, filesystem, tunnels, volumes, terminate, and poll operations.

title: Fly Machines Resource
relevance: Documents Fly Machines lifecycle endpoints for create, start, stop, suspend, delete, wait, lease, metadata, and machine configuration.

title: Docker Engine API
relevance: Documents Docker Engine as a RESTful API to the Docker daemon and SDK/API versioning model.

title: Firecracker Repository API Overview
relevance: Documents Firecracker as a single VMM process exposing an OpenAPI-specified host API for microVM configuration and lifecycle.
